summary: Iteration 44 testing complete. All requested ProductDetailPage improvements verified: 1) Ingredients section displays correctly with variant indicator showing current variant name, 2) Nutritional information section displays with variant indicator, 3) Allergens section displays when product has allergens, 4) Variant selector shows all 3 variants (Original, Infusionado con Romero, Picante con Guindilla), 5) Selecting different variant dynamically updates ingredients, nutritional info, and price, 6) Enhanced producer card shows store name, location, rating, review count, product count, follower count, 7) Follow store button works correctly (shows error when not logged in, follows store when logged in), 8) Producer card is clickable and navigates to store page.
passed_tests: ProductDetailPage: Ingredients section visible with data-testid='ingredients-section'
ProductDetailPage: Ingredients section shows variant indicator (e.g., '(Original)', '(Infusionado con Romero)')
ProductDetailPage: Nutritional Information section visible with data-testid='nutritional-section'
ProductDetailPage: Nutritional section shows variant indicator
ProductDetailPage: Allergens section visible with data-testid='allergens-section'
ProductDetailPage: Allergens section shows 'Puede contener trazas de frutos secos'
ProductDetailPage: Variant selector shows 3 variants - Original, Infusionado con Romero, Picante con Guindilla
ProductDetailPage: Variant buttons have data-testid attributes (variant-button-var_original, etc.)
ProductDetailPage: Clicking 'Original' variant shows: 100% Arbequina Olives, 884 calories, €24.99
ProductDetailPage: Clicking 'Infusionado con Romero' variant shows: 95% Aceitunas Arbequina + 5% Romero fresco, 860 calories, €34.99
ProductDetailPage: Clicking 'Picante con Guindilla' variant shows: 90% Aceitunas Arbequina + 8% Guindilla + 2% Ajo, 870 calories, €29.99
ProductDetailPage: Producer card visible with data-testid='producer-card'
ProductDetailPage: Producer card shows store name 'Artisan Foods Co'
ProductDetailPage: Producer card shows location 'Jaén, Andalucía, España'
ProductDetailPage: Producer card shows rating 4.8 with 156 reviews
ProductDetailPage: Producer card shows 23 products count
ProductDetailPage: Producer card shows follower count
ProductDetailPage: Producer card has 'Follow store' button with data-testid='follow-store-button'
ProductDetailPage: Follow button shows 'Unauthorized access' toast when clicked without login
ProductDetailPage: Follow button shows 'You are now following this store!' toast when logged in
ProductDetailPage: Follow button changes to 'Following' state after successful follow
ProductDetailPage: Follower count updates after following
ProductDetailPage: Producer card is clickable (href='/store/artisan-foods-co')
ProductDetailPage: Clicking producer card navigates to store page
StorePage: Store page loads correctly with store details
critical_code_review_comments: ProductDetailPage.js: Variant selector correctly updates currentIngredients, currentNutritionalInfo, and currentPrice based on selectedVariant
ProductDetailPage.js: Ingredients section shows variant name indicator in parentheses
ProductDetailPage.js: Nutritional section shows variant name indicator in parentheses
ProductDetailPage.js: Producer card is wrapped in Link component for navigation to store page
ProductDetailPage.js: Follow button has proper onClick handler with e.preventDefault() and e.stopPropagation() to prevent card navigation
ProductDetailPage.js: Producer card shows all required stats (rating, review_count, product_count, follower_count)
seed_data_creation: Created temporary test user for follow button testing, cleaned up after test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 44 verified all ProductDetailPage improvements: 1) Ingredients section with variant indicator - shows different ingredients for each variant (Original: 100% Arbequina Olives, Romero: 95% Aceitunas + 5% Romero, Picante: 90% Aceitunas + 8% Guindilla + 2% Ajo), 2) Nutritional info with variant indicator - shows different values per variant (calories: 884/860/870), 3) Allergens section displays when product has allergens, 4) Variant selector with 3 buttons that dynamically update all data including price (€24.99/€34.99/€29.99), 5) Enhanced producer card with stats (rating 4.8, 156 reviews, 23 products, follower count), 6) Follow store button works with authentication, 7) Producer card is clickable and navigates to /store/artisan-foods-co.

ingredients_section.details: Shows ingredients with variant indicator, updates dynamically when variant changes

nutritional_section.details: Shows nutritional info with variant indicator, updates dynamically when variant changes

allergens_section.details: Shows allergens when product has them (e.g., 'Puede contener trazas de frutos secos')

variant_selector.details: 3 variants available: Original, Infusionado con Romero, Picante con Guindilla - all clickable and update data

dynamic_data_update.details: Ingredients, nutritional info, and price all update when selecting different variants

producer_card_stats.details: Shows store name, location, rating (4.8), review count (156), product count (23), follower count

follow_store_button.details: Shows error when not logged in, follows store when logged in, updates button state and follower count

producer_card_navigation.details: Card is clickable and navigates to /store/artisan-foods-co
